title: Grilled Thai Pepper Chicken
description: A spicy Thai-inspired dish featuring grilled chicken and pepper, served with a side of traditional Thai flavors.
instructions: 1. In a blender or food processor, combine fish sauce, soy sauce, brown sugar, ginger, garlic, and lime juice to make the marinade.
2. Place the chicken in a large bowl and pour the marinade over it. Toss to coat and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
3. Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
4. Remove the chicken from the marinade and season with salt and pepper.
5. Grill the chicken for 5-7 minutes per side, or until it reaches an internal temperature of 165°F.
6. Meanwhile, brush the slices of Thai red pepper with coconut oil and grill for 2-3 minutes per side, or until they are slightly charred.
7. Once the chicken is cooked, let it rest for 5 minutes before slicing it thinly.
8. Serve the grilled chicken with the charred Thai red peppers and garnish with chopped cilantro.
9. Serve with steamed jasmine rice or noodles, if desired.
